questions.question: Describe the primary function of the kernel in an operating system.
questions.hint: Focus on the kernel's role in managing hardware resources

questions.question: What type of operating system is designed to provide a high degree of portability and adaptability?
questions.hint: Consider the characteristics of mobile operating systems

questions.question: Explain the purpose of device drivers in an operating system.
questions.hint: Focus on how device drivers interact with hardware devices
